title: Coles in Talks to Buy Pet Shop and Vet Business Greencross
title_cn: Coles 正在洽谈收购宠物店和兽医业务 Greencross
summary: Coles Group Ltd. said it’s in talks to buy pet store and veterinary business Greencross Pet Wellness Co., a deal that reportedly could be valued at as much as A$4 billion ($2.8 billion).

title: Sixth Street, KKR Provide BridgeBio $1 Billion Preferred Equity
title_cn: Sixth Street、KKR 提供 BridgeBio 10 亿美元优先股
summary: Sixth Street Partners and KKR & Co. have agreed to provide $1 billion of preferred equity to biotechnology company BridgeBio Pharma Inc., according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Yuan Rally Bets Fade as Options Traders Turn Bullish on Dollar
title_cn: 随着期权交易员转而看好美元，人民币升值押注逐渐消退
summary: Bullish bets on the Chinese yuan are fading, with options traders unwinding one of the year’s most crowded trades after the Federal Reserve’s hawkish pivot.

title: Iran War Delivers Massive Swings in Chinese Petrochemicals Trade
title_cn: 伊朗战争导致中国石化产品贸易大幅波动
summary: The war in Iran has rewired China’s petrochemicals trade, allowing plants to ease their glut of the key building blocks for plastics, rubber and textiles by boosting exports.

title: Asian Stocks Rise After US Tech Gains, Yen Steady: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国科技股上涨、日元稳定：市场收尾，亚洲股市上涨
summary: Asian equities rose Wednesday after capping their best quarter in 17 years, as a rally in chipmakers and signs of US economic resilience fueled optimism about corporate earnings.

title: Alcoa Bets on Aluminum Boom With $5.6 Billion South32 Deal
title_cn: 美铝公司以 56 亿美元的 South32 交易押注铝业繁荣
summary: Alcoa Corp. has agreed to buy South32 Ltd.’s bauxite, alumina and aluminum assets in a deal worth as much as $5.6 billion, cementing its position as a top producer as long-term demand strengthens and the Iran war exposes supply concerns.

title: Philippine Church Group Continues Protests, Disrupting Manila
title_cn: 菲律宾教会团体继续抗议，扰乱马尼拉
summary: An influential religious group continued its protest for a second day on Wednesday in support of a senator allied with Vice President Sara Duterte, again slowing traffic in Manila’s main highway.

title: Kotak Reclaims India ECM Lead With Mega Deals on Horizon
title_cn: Kotak 凭借巨额交易夺回印度 ECM 领先地位
summary: Kotak Mahindra Capital Co. reclaimed the top spot in India’s equity capital markets league table for the first half of the year, putting it in position to dominate a year with the country’s largest-ever initial public offerings in the pipeline.

title: Oil Edges Up as Peace Talks Continue, Hormuz Traffic Recovers
title_cn: 随着和谈继续，霍尔木兹交通恢复，油价小幅上涨
summary: Oil inched higher after the biggest quarterly drop since the pandemic, as traders monitored peace talks between the US and Iran and the return of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Paris-Educated Economist Tapped as Colombian Finance Chief
title_cn: 巴黎教育的经济学家被任命为哥伦比亚财政部长
summary: Colombian President-elect Abelardo de la Espriella named Miguel Gómez to be his finance minister, tapping the former lawmaker from a conservative political dynasty to curb a rising national debt load and restore investor confidence.

title: US Labor Market Steady as Stocks Gain
title_cn: 随着股市上涨，美国劳动力市场稳定
summary: US stocks advanced on Tuesday as the main indexes notched their best quarter in six years and traders parsed the latest economic data. Bloomberg's Enda Curran has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jardine Matheson Taps Ex-Indonesian Fund CIO as Country Head
title_cn: 怡和洋行任命前印度尼西亚基金首席信息官为国家主管
summary: Jardine Matheson Holdings has hired Christopher Ganis, formerly chief investment officer at sovereign wealth fund Indonesia Investment Authority, as Indonesia country head, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Gold Steadies as US-Iran Peace Talks Frame Inflation Outlook
title_cn: 美伊和平谈判框架通胀前景，金价持稳
summary: Gold was steady, with traders assessing peace talks between the US and Iran and weighing a fresh slew of US economic data for clues on the Federal Reserve’s next move on interest rates.

title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4 Billion in 2025 Crypto Earnings
title_cn: 特朗普报告 2025 年加密货币收益至少为 14 亿美元
summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

title: Nike Sees Weakness Persisting as Wall Street Patience Wears Thin
title_cn: 随着华尔街耐心逐渐减弱，耐克认为疲软持续存在
summary: Nike Inc. executives on Tuesday gave a cautious outlook and warned about elevated consumer anxiety, adding to investor concerns about the sportswear company’s painfully slow turnaround.

title: Oaktree Capital-Backed ITG Raises $312.2 Million in US IPO
title_cn: 橡树资本支持的 ITG 在美国 IPO 筹集 3.122 亿美元
summary: Digital infrastructure services firm ITG Inc. raised $312.2 million in a US initial public offering, pricing its shares below a marketed range.

title: Shutterstock Shares Fall After Getty Says It Will End Merger
title_cn: Getty 表示将结束合并后 Shutterstock 股价下跌
summary: Shares of Shutterstock Inc. plunged about 30% in after-hours trading after Getty Images Holdings Inc. said it would cancel a planned merger due to a ruling from UK regulators.

title: Nike Appoints Pfizer CFO as New Finance Chief Amid Industry Experience Questions
title_cn: 耐克任命辉瑞首席财务官为新任财务主管，以应对行业经验问题
summary: Nina Trentmann, Senior Editor at Bloomberg News, discussed the recent appointment of Dave Denton, formerly Pfizer's CFO, as Nike's new Finance Chief. While some analysts have expressed concerns about Denton's lack of direct retail and apparel industry experience, Trentmann noted that for large companies like Nike and Pfizer, deep industry knowledge may be less critical than experience managing a complex, global business with a significant market capitalization and extensive supply chains. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Progress Software Earnings Beat Estimates, Boosts Forecast
title_cn: Progress Software 盈利超出预期，提振预测
summary: Yogesh Gupta, CEO of Progress Software, said that AI is a big driver for his company as it beat earnings estimates and boosts forecasts for the next quarter. Gupta said that his company can aggregate data for AI in a way that reduces the number of tokens necessary to run AI agents and saves customers money.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Assessing Nike vs. Adidas as World Cup Heats Up
title_cn: 世界杯升温之际评估耐克与阿迪达斯
summary: Drake MacFarlane, M Science Research Analyst, expressed cautious optimism about Nike's recent apparel sales boost, particularly from soccer jerseys, noting it as a positive short-term factor. However, he emphasized that Nike's need to strengthen its sports credentials and improve its footwear segment represents a longer-term challenge. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Market Still Regulating Despite 'Flare Ups' Says Samantha Dart
title_cn: 萨曼莎·达特 (Samantha Dart) 表示，尽管石油市场“爆发”，但石油市场仍在监管
summary: Samantha Dart, co-head of global commodities research at Goldman Sachs, said that markets haven't reacted to 'flare ups' in the Strait of Hormuz because US energy exports and China imports have remained consistent, signaling the oil market is still headed in the right direction.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Factory Activity Returns to Growth | The China Show 6/30/2026
title_cn: 中国工厂活动恢复增长|中国展 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Yao Ming on NBA Legacy, Steph Curry, Global Expansion
title_cn: 姚明谈 NBA 遗产、斯蒂芬·库里、全球扩张
summary: NBA Hall of Famer Yao Ming discusses being a part of the New York–Shanghai Science & Technology Forum. He discusses the global expansion of the NBA, and the popularity of basketball around the world. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil Real Becomes ‘Collateral Damage’ as Dollar Roars Back
title_cn: 美元飙升，巴西雷亚尔成为“附带损害”
summary: The Brazilian real recorded its worst month this year as a rebound in the dollar and shifting interest-rate expectations push investors to unwind one of their most favored carry trades.

title: Debt and Risky Bets Fuel South Korea and Taiwan's AI Stock Boom
title_cn: 债务和高风险押注推动韩国和台湾的人工智能股票繁荣
summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, how an AI-driven stock boom in Taiwan and South Korea is enticing investors to take big risks on one of the world’s hottest market rallies.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: 40年ぶり円安の先、高市首相の長期戦略、米イラン和平交渉、米経済統計、米最高裁判断

title: Citigroup CEO Brings Long-Troubled Bank Into Trump’s Graces
title_cn: 花旗集团首席执行官让长期陷入困境的银行受到特朗普的青睐
summary: Citigroup's CEO Jane Fraser has brought the third-largest bank back from the brink and is quickly building a rapport with President Trump and his administration, a feat that has eluded many peers. Todd Gillespie explains how she managed it  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kura Sushi to Accelerate US Growth to Fend Off Rivals’ Expansion
title_cn: Kura Sushi 将加速美国增长以抵御竞争对手的扩张
summary: Conveyor-belt sushi operator Kura Sushi Inc. has an ambitious target to grow its store count by 20% a year in the US, betting that it can build market share before a wave of competitors rolls in.

title: Canadian Stocks Beating US for a Second Year as Banks Surge
title_cn: 随着银行股飙升，加拿大股市连续第二年跑赢美国股市
summary: Canada’s equity benchmark is positioned to outperform its US counterpart for a second year in a row — which would be its first back-to-back win in 15 years.

title: US Lifts Export Restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5 AI Model
title_cn: 美国取消对 Anthropic 的《神鬼寓言 5》人工智能模型的出口限制
summary: The US government removed foreign access restrictions on Anthropic PBC’s Fable 5 artificial intelligence model, clearing it for wider distribution after the startup resolved the Trump administration’s safety concerns.

title: Lee’s $880 Billion AI Bet Ties Legacy to Korea’s Chip Boom
title_cn: Lee 的 8800 亿美元 AI 赌注将遗产与韩国芯片繁荣联系起来
summary: With South Korea already one of the biggest winners of the global AI boom, President Lee Jae Myung is now staking his legacy on a plan to transform the nation’s less developed southwest into a global chip hub.

title: Nike Earnings Surpass Expectations as Q2 Comes to a Close | The Close 6/30/2026
title_cn: 第二季度即将结束，耐克盈利超出预期收盘价 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are BlackRock Global Co-Head of iShares Fixed Income ETFs Steve Laipply, BNY Head of Market Structure Nate Wuerffel, RBC Capital Markets Managing Director, Software Equity Research Rishi Jaluria, Former US Ambassador to Israel & Former US Treasury Secretary Jack Lew, Pivotal Advisors CEO & CIO Tiffany McGhee, CFRA Equity Analyst Zachary Warring, M Science Research Analyst Drake MacFarlane, WSL Strategic Retail CEO & Chief Shopper Wendy Liebmann, Christian & Timbers Founder & CEO Jeff Christian, & NBA Hall of Famer Yao Ming. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nike Succession in Focus With New CFO Ready To Take Helm
title_cn: 耐克新任首席财务官准备掌舵，继任成为焦点
summary: Jeff Christian, Founder and CEO of Executive Search firm Christian & Timbers, discusses Nike's strategic shift following the completion of its CEO transition. He highlights that the company is now in 'proof mode,' emphasizing execution and delivering improved financial results. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Crypto 6/30/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 6/30/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Kalshi Head of Enforcement Robert DeNault, BitGet CEO Gracy Chen, Luxor Technology COO Ethan Vera, and Fireblocks Policy Director Dea Markova. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Debt and Risky Bets Fuel South Korea and Taiwan's AI Stock Boom
title_cn: 债务和高风险押注推动韩国和台湾的人工智能股票繁荣
summary: An AI boom has spurred historic rallies in Taiwan and South Korea’s stock markets. But with gains fueled by borrowed money and risky bets, what comes next? Find out on the Big Take Asia podcast. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Don't See Slowdown in Institutional Client Interest: Markova
title_cn: 马尔科瓦：机构客户兴趣并未放缓
summary: Dea Markova, policy director at Fireblocks, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss the expected updated draft to the Clarity Act that may be released soon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Crypto Bill Draft Expected Soon
title_cn: 新的加密货币法案草案预计即将推出
summary: Bloomberg Intelligences Nathan Dean joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." One of the Republican senators spearheading efforts to pass an industry-backed measure to regulate cryptocurrency and digital assets said Thursday lawmakers plan to soon release an “updated draft” of the bill that seeks to address members’ concerns over ethics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court to Hear Apple Appeal Over Contempt Ruling
title_cn: 最高法院将听取苹果公司对藐视法庭裁决的上诉
summary: The Supreme Court agreed to hear an appeal by Apple Inc. regarding a contempt ruling in its long-running antitrust battle with Fortnite-maker Epic Games Inc.

title: Bitcoin Miners Valuable Asset for Electric Grid: Vera
title_cn: 比特币矿工对电网的宝贵资产：维拉
summary: Ethan Vera, COO of Luxor Technology, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Many miners are shifting their focus to AI. More broadly, crypto firms are beginning to apply the infrastructure and market expertise they built around digital assets to AI, from converting mining sites into data centers to building markets for GPUs and computing power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitget CEO Discusses Tokenization, Market-Making
title_cn: Bitget首席执行官讨论代币化和做市
summary: Gracy Chen, CEO of Bitget, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Securitize Set to Go Public Thursday
title_cn: 证券化将于周四上市
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Dushyant Shahrawat joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Securitize debuts on the New York Stock Exchange this Thursday after investors approved its SPAC merger, which will make it one of the first publicly traded pure-play tokenization companies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Cuts Starlink Internet Prices in Memphis After Data Center Opposition
title_cn: 因数据中心反对，SpaceX 降低孟菲斯星链互联网价格
summary: SpaceX is offering discounts for Starlink internet plans in Memphis, Tennessee, as the Elon Musk-led company endures blowback and legal challenges from opponents of its data centers in the area and neighboring Mississippi.

title: Anthropic Releases Claude Science for Automating Research
title_cn: Anthropic 发布 Claude Science 用于自动化研究
summary: Anthropic PBC is releasing new software aimed at helping scientists automate research, in the hopes of reducing some of the tedious aspects of their work.

title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Sets Stage for More Media, Cable Deals
title_cn: 康卡斯特分拆 NBC 为更多媒体和有线电视交易奠定了基础
summary: Brian Roberts lost out on an opportunity last year to merge NBCUniversal with Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. But the process helped get the chairman and co-chief executive officer of Comcast Corp. thinking about what NBCUniversal would look like on its own.

title: High Interest in Perpetual Futures: Kalshi's DeNault
title_cn: 对永续合约的高度兴趣：Kalshi 的 DeNault
summary: Robert DeNault, head of enforcement at Kalshi, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Last month the CFTC permitted the listing of perpetual futures on US exchanges. Kalshi’s contracts were the first perpetual futures approved by the CFTC, marking an expansion beyond the company’s core business of listing event contracts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin ETFs on Track for Record Monthly Outflow
title_cn: 比特币 ETF 月度流出量有望创历史新高
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's James Seyffart joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Bitcoin’s biggest institutional sources of demand are faltering at the same time, leaving the cryptocurrency increasingly exposed as ETF investors pull money at a record pace and questions persist over the financing playbook behind its largest corporate buyer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Saylor's Strategy May Sell Up to $1.25 Billion of Bitcoin
title_cn: Saylor 的策略可能会出售高达 12.5 亿美元的比特币
summary: Bloomberg's Monique Mulima joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Michael Saylor’s Strategy unveiled a sweeping overhaul of the financing model underpinning its Bitcoin strategy, giving itself broader powers to sell the cryptocurrency, buy back securities and preserve liquidity as it adapts to mounting pressure on the structure that fueled years of aggressive accumulation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubenstein Doesn't See the AI Stock Bubble Bursting
title_cn: 鲁宾斯坦没有看到人工智能股票泡沫破裂
summary: David Rubenstein, the founder and co-chairman of the Carlyle Group and host of "Bloomberg Wealth," says he doesn't expect the AI bubble to pop anytime soon. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TikTok Finalizing Settlement of Addiction Lawsuit to Avoid Trial
title_cn: TikTok 完成成瘾诉讼的和解以避免审判
summary: TikTok is finalizing a settlement related to a lawsuit claiming that the world’s largest social media platforms are addictive to minors, according to people familiar with the matter, avoiding a jury trial scheduled for July in Los Angeles.

title: Amazon to Pay $2.25 Million to End US Case Over ID Theft
title_cn: 亚马逊将支付 225 万美元结束美国身份盗窃案
summary: Amazon.com Inc. agreed to pay $2.25 million to settle US claims that it routinely failed to provide records to help customers who were victims of identity theft.

title: How US Immigration Rules Are Inciting a Tech Brain Drain
title_cn: 美国移民规则如何引发科技人才流失
summary: The Supreme Court officially struck down President Trump's signature restrictions on birthright citizenship, with implications for the future of the US tech workforce, which relies heavily on immigrant talent. Hiba Anver, partner with Erickson Immigration Group, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aspiring Nvidia Rival Gets Backing From Jane Street
title_cn: 有抱负的 Nvidia 竞争对手得到了 Jane Street 的支持
summary: Startup Etched is emerging from stealth with an eye towards taking on chip heavyweight Nvidia, as the industry shifts from training AI models to running them. The company has raised $800 million in funding including backing from Jane Street and TSMC-linked firm Venture Tech Alliance. Etched CEO Gavin Uberti sits down with Ed Ludlow for more on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Billion-Dollar Mix-Up Costs Korean Investors a Shot at SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 数十亿美元的混淆让韩国投资者失去了 SpaceX IPO 的机会
summary: A billion-dollar misunderstanding has left Korean investors empty-handed in the blockbuster SpaceX IPO. Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" with the details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks on Track for Best Quarter Ever | Bloomberg Tech 6/30/2026
title_cn: 芯片股有望迎来有史以来最好的季度业绩彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down what's behind the chip stock rally, with the sector heading toward its best quarter ever. Plus, Taiwan raids the offices of Super Micro as part of an investigation into the alleged smuggling of Nvidia chips into China. And, how a billion-dollar misunderstanding has left Korean investors empty-handed in the blockbuster SpaceX IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ASML, Chip-Tool Stocks Soar as Samsung, SK Plan Investments
title_cn: 三星、SK 计划投资 ASML、芯片工具股飙升
summary: Shares of companies that supply semiconductor equipment are soaring this week as increased investments from leading chipmakers in South Korea bolster investors’ optimism.

title: India Temple Donation Probe Casts Shadow Over Modi’s Key Project
title_cn: 印度寺庙捐赠调查给莫迪的关键项目蒙上阴影
summary: An investigation into alleged financial irregularities at a Hindu temple closely associated with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi is threatening to tarnish one of his party’s signature projects.

title: Trump Reports Earning $26 Million From Foreign Real Estate Deals
title_cn: 特朗普报告从外国房地产交易中赚取了 2600 万美元
summary: President Donald Trump said he had earned at least $26 million in income from an array of new real estate ventures abroad, illustrating how his fortune has grown as his family embraces foreign deal-making in his second term.

title: Trump Takes a Backseat to Reagan Conservatives at Supreme Court
title_cn: 特朗普在最高法院让位给里根保守派
summary: President Donald Trump may have built the Supreme Court’s supermajority, but it was the Reagan Revolution that prevailed during the just-completed term.

title: US Says Witkoff, Kushner Had Positive Talks in Doha on Iran Deal
title_cn: 美国称维特科夫和库什纳在多哈就伊朗协议进行了积极会谈
summary: US negotiators Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff had positive discussions with regional leaders in Qatar and technical talks with Iran are moving ahead, according to a senior administration official, as the countries seek to ease tensions in the wake of recent attacks that imperiled an already fragile ceasefire.

title: Trump & Vance Release Financial Disclosure Reports | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/30/2026
title_cn: 特朗普和万斯发布财务披露报告|权力平衡：最新版 06/30/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Representative Nick LaLota, a New York Republican and member of the House Appropriations and Homeland Security committees, says he was “a little disappointed” by the Supreme Court’s birthright citizenship ruling but believes the opinion leaves room for Congress to act. Rebecca Shi, CEO of the American Business Immigration Coalition, warns Supreme Court decisions affecting Temporary Protected Status could pull hundreds of thousands of workers from the labor force and worsen shortages in health care and long-term care. Representative Greg Stanton, an Arizona Democrat and member of the House Foreign Affairs, Transportation and China Select committees, says Speaker Mike Johnson should work with Democrats on a bipartisan National Defense Authorization Act rather than rely on Republican holdouts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Stanton Urges Bipartisan Path on Defense Bill
title_cn: 众议员斯坦顿敦促两党共同制定国防法案
summary: Representative Greg Stanton, an Arizona Democrat and member of the House Foreign Affairs, Transportation and China Select committees, says Speaker Mike Johnson should work with Democrats on a bipartisan National Defense Authorization Act rather than rely on Republican holdouts. Rep. Stanton criticizes provisions dealing with abortion and transgender military service, saying they were added to be “purposely divisive.” He also discusses the risk of a September government shutdown, birthright citizenship, China competition and President Donald Trump’s financial disclosures. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Expert: TPS Rulings Risk Deepening Labor Shortages
title_cn: 专家：TPS 裁决有加剧劳动力短缺的风险
summary: Rebecca Shi, CEO of the American Business Immigration Coalition, warns Supreme Court decisions affecting Temporary Protected Status could pull hundreds of thousands of workers from the labor force and worsen shortages in health care and long-term care. Shi celebrates the court’s birthright citizenship ruling, saying it gives employers certainty. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. LaLota Sees Path to Limiting Birthright Citizenship
title_cn: 众议员拉洛塔看到了限制出生公民权的途径
summary: Representative Nick LaLota, a New York Republican and member of the House Appropriations and Homeland Security committees, says he was “a little disappointed” by the Supreme Court’s birthright citizenship ruling but believes the opinion leaves room for Congress to act. LaLota says he sees a path for lawmakers to pursue legislation “to narrow the scope” and limit birthright citizenship to those lawfully present in the US and not on tourist visas. He also discusses the court’s campaign-finance ruling, the outlook for Iran talks, gas prices and President Donald Trump’s financial disclosures. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Fight for Voter ID Law Stalls Defense Bill in US House
title_cn: 特朗普争取选民身份法在美国众议院搁置国防法案
summary: President Donald Trump’s demand for new voter identification requirements on Tuesday sidelined a planned congressional vote on a $1.15 trillion annual defense policy bill his administration is seeking.

title: Trump’s DOT Moves to Roll Back Obama-Era Airfare Marketing Rule
title_cn: 特朗普的交通部采取行动取消奥巴马时代的机票营销规则
summary: The US Transportation Department is proposing to roll back a requirement that airlines display total ticket prices more prominently than individual components, such as taxes and fees, in their advertising.

title: Trump Announces Dallas Will Host September Midterm Convention
title_cn: 特朗普宣布达拉斯将举办九月中期大会
summary: President Donald Trump announced Republicans would host a midterm convention in Dallas on Sept. 9-10, an event first floated last year as a way of rallying party voters ahead of what’s expected to be a hard-fought battle for control of Congress in the November elections.

title: Orban Steered More Contracts to Allies Before Loss, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称欧尔班在损失之前向盟友提供了更多合同
summary: The government of former Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban was directing an ever greater share of spending toward politically-connected companies in the two years leading up to a landslide election defeat, a report from an anti-graft body showed.

title: Supreme Court Backs Birthright Citizenship in Blow to Trump
title_cn: 最高法院支持出生公民权，对特朗普构成打击
summary: The US Supreme Court rejected a central plank of President Donald Trump’s immigration agenda on Tuesday, deeming his plan to restrict birthright citizenship to be unconstitutional.

title: UK Defense Plan Blows £5 Billion Hole in Burnham’s Budget
title_cn: 英国国防计划导致伯纳姆预算缺口 50 亿英镑
summary: The UK’s long-awaited Defense Investment Plan leaves several hard choices for Andy Burnham to make if he becomes prime minister, including how to close an almost £5 billion ($6.6 billion) hole in his first budget.

title: Trump Wins Big, Loses Big in Supreme Court Rulings
title_cn: 特朗普在最高法院的裁决中大赢大输
summary: The president’s immigration agenda suffers a setback, but Republican midterm candidates get a boost.

title: Witkoff, Kushner to Hold Indirect Talks With Iran
title_cn: 威特科夫、库什纳将与伊朗举行间接会谈
summary: Qatar said Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff had arrived in Doha as part of ongoing peace negotiations between the US and Iran. Qatari officials say they won't meet directly with the Iranians. Jeff Mason reports from the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Treasury Secretary Lew on Iran Talks, US-Israel Relations
title_cn: 前财政部长卢谈伊朗会谈、美以关系
summary: Jack Lew, former US Treasury Secretary and former US ambassador to Israel, says economic sanctions on Iran can be effective but need to be used with care. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Lew also comments on the US dollar and the Israel-Lebanon pact. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CIA Aims to Speed Up Tech Adoption as AI Is ‘Rewriting’ Conflict
title_cn: 人工智能正在“改写”冲突，中央情报局旨在加快技术采用
summary: CIA Director John Ratcliffe vowed to step up the agency’s efforts to deploy artificial intelligence and quantum computing, stressing that rapid developments in emerging technologies are changing the nature of geopolitics.

title: Venezuela Quake Death Toll Nears 2,000; Machado Stuck in Panama
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数接近2000人；马查多被困巴拿马
summary: The death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela last week rose to nearly 2,000, as aftershocks eased in both frequency and intensity and authorities expanded recovery efforts.

title: US Sanctions Mexican Companies for Cartel-Linked Fuel Smuggling
title_cn: 美国制裁与卡特尔相关的燃料走私墨西哥公司
summary: The US Treasury announced sanctions against two Mexican citizens and nine companies in the country that the agency said are linked to a fuel-smuggling scheme with ties to a cartel.

title: Stocks See Best Quarter Since 2020 As Chips Soar | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/30/2026
title_cn: 随着筹码飙升，股市迎来 2020 年以来最好的季度彭博商业周刊日报 6/30/2026
summary: Today, June Grasso, Bloomberg legal analyst and host of 'Bloomberg Law,' discusses the Supreme Court's decision to uphold birthright citizenship in the United States. Then, Bloomberg's Ian King dives into semiconductor rally as chips send stocks to their best quarter in six years. Plus, Dan Suzuki, global investment strategist at iCapital, said that market tailwinds are in the rearview and that he expects inflation is at or near its peak and will soon come back down. Finally, Brett Pulley, Bloomberg News Atlanta bureau chief, breaks down why costs are rising in the American South and how communities are feeling squeezed financially as a result. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emergency Ordered for Largest US Power Grid as Record Heat Nears
title_cn: 创纪录高温临近，美国最大电网紧急订购
summary: The Trump administration has declared a power emergency for the nation’s largest energy grid in advance of a dangerous heat wave that threatens to strain electricity infrastructure.

title: Anti-Migrant Protests Draw Thousands Across South Africa
title_cn: 南非各地数千人举行反移民抗议活动
summary: Thousands of people joined anti-migrant protests in South Africa on Tuesday, watched over by a massive police contingent that was deployed to prevent violence and intimidation.

title: NJ’s Kean Says He Was Treated for Depression During Absence
title_cn: 新泽西州的基恩说他在缺席期间接受了抑郁症治疗
summary: New Jersey Representative Tom Kean Jr. revealed that he has been treated for depression as he returned to the US House to vote for the first time in nearly four months.

title: High Court Backs Birthright Citizenship | Balance of Power 6/30/2026
title_cn: 高等法院支持出生公民权|权力平衡 6/30/2026
summary:
On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the end of the Supreme Court's latest term. On today's show, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Maywood Strategies Founder Doug Farrar, former FTC Commissioner Rebecca Slaughter and Kpler Head of Policy and Geopolitical Risk Michelle Brouhard.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How a Trump-Championed Voter ID Bill Would Change US Elections
title_cn: 特朗普支持的选民身份法案将如何改变美国选举
summary: President Donald Trump and his staunchest congressional allies have threatened a legislative blockade over a contentious voter identification law that would significantly reshape how Americans vote in November.

title: Carney Concedes Canada Will Overshoot Emissions Forecasts
title_cn: 卡尼承认加拿大将超出排放预测
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said Canada’s emissions will be higher in the coming years than previously projected, his clearest admission yet that the country’s near-term climate targets are likely out of reach.

title: The Bad News About the Birthright Ruling
title_cn: 关于出生权裁决的坏消息
summary: The Supreme Court ruled correctly on birthright citizenship, but the vote revealed an outrageous conclusion from the dissenting justices, says Harvard Law Professor and Bloomberg Opinion columnist Noah Feldman. (Source: Bloomberg)
